items.title: fix(gateway): remove re-introduced auth.mode=none pairing bypass
items.summary: fix(gateway): remove re-introduced auth.mode=none pairing bypass The revert of #43478 (commit 39b4185d0b) was silently undone by 3704293e6f which was based on a branch that included the original change. This removes the auth.mode=none skipPairing condition again. The blanket skip was too broad - it disabled pairing for ALL websocket clients, not just Control UI behind reverse proxies.
